title: Charang Monastery (Rangrik Shungma)
description: An ancient Buddhist temple in the remote village of Charang, Kinnaur district, Himachal Pradesh, along the Kinner Kailash Parikrama route.

title: Spiti Valley Expedition
description: Driving through the high-altitude desert and rugged mountain passes bordering the Kinnaur and Spiti Valley regions.

title: Snowy Day in Naperville
description: A beautiful winter landscape in Naperville on a snowy day after Evey was born. (From left: Remya, Evey, and Gigin.)

title: Shweta at Vista House
description: A scenic portrait of Shweta at the historic Vista House at Crown Point, overlooking the Columbia River Gorge in Oregon.

title: Columbia River Gorge from Crown Point
description: The dramatic, sweeping cliffs and winding waters of the Columbia River Gorge as seen from Vista House in Oregon.

title: Day 1: Royal Enfield Desert Storm
description: Starting Day 1 of the epic motorcycle expedition from Trivandrum, Kerala to Agumbe, Karnataka on the Royal Enfield Desert Storm.

title: Sunset over the Ganges
description: A quiet, memorable sunset over the wide banks of the Ganges River in Varanasi, captured from a boat just before the evening Aarti ceremony.
location: Ganges River, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

title: Dashrath Manjhi Path - Gehlaur Ghati
description: Standing at the famous path carved through the Gehlaur Hills by Dashrath Manjhi, 'The Mountain Man', who chiseled the mountain alone for 22 years.

title: Candid Portrait near Nalanda
description: A curious local kid posing for a photo near the historic ancient ruins of Nalanda University in Bihar.

title: Evening Ganga Aarti in Varanasi
description: The dramatic, synchronized fire ritual performed by priests at Dashashwamedh Ghat on the banks of the Ganges River.
location: Dashashwamedh Ghat, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

title: Fire Rituals of Varanasi
description: A close-up view of the priests offering prayers with multi-tiered brass lamps during the spectacular evening Ganga Aarti.
location: Dashashwamedh Ghat, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

title: Hike to Dhankar Lake
description: Trekking the steep mountain trail overlooking Dhankar village on the way to the high-altitude Dhankar Lake in Spiti.
location: Dhankar Lake Trail, Spiti Valley, Himachal Pradesh, India

title: Dhankar Lake Summit
description: Reaching the serene, high-altitude Dhankar Lake perched on the mountaintop at over 13,500 feet.
location: Dhankar Lake, Spiti Valley, Himachal Pradesh, India

title: High-Altitude Trekking in Spiti
description: Trekking through the barren, majestic mountain landscape of Spiti Valley with my friend Pradeep.

title: Unpaved Roads of Spiti
description: Navigating one of the unpaved, treacherous cliffside mountain roads that define travel in the high-altitude Spiti region.

title: Trekking near Chandratal
description: Hiking the rugged, high-altitude trails near Chandratal Lake (The Moon Lake) in the Spiti region.
location: Chandratal Lake Trail, Spiti Valley, Himachal Pradesh, India

title: First Sight of Snow at Kunzum Pass
description: My friend Pradeep enjoying the first sight of deep snow walls at Kunzum Pass (elevation 4,590m) during our mountain expedition.
location: Kunzum Pass, Spiti Valley, Himachal Pradesh, India

title: Great Smoky Mountains Escape
description: Lazing around and enjoying the peaceful woodland cabin surroundings in the Great Smoky Mountains.
location: Great Smoky Mountains National Park, Tennessee, USA

title: Smoky Mountains Airbnb
description: Our cozy, rustic winter log cabin Airbnb nestled deep in the forests of the Smoky Mountains.

title: Trekking Charlies Bunion
description: Hiking the snowy, rugged 8-mile Charlies Bunion trail along the Appalachian Trail in winter.
location: Charlies Bunion Trail, Great Smoky Mountains, Tennessee, USA

title: Charlies Bunion Summit
description: Standing at the rocky, dramatic summit of Charlies Bunion, surrounded by freezing winter mist and sweeping mountain valleys.
location: Charlies Bunion, Great Smoky Mountains, Tennessee, USA

title: Evie's First Photoshoot
description: A beautiful, heartwarming baby photoshoot of Evie shortly after she was born.

title: Conquering the Tail of the Dragon
description: Driving the legendary, winding Tail of the Dragon highway (US 129) with its 318 curves in 11 miles.
location: Tail of the Dragon, Deal's Gap, North Carolina, USA
